BENE_STATE_CD 
LABEL: 
Beneficiary State 
DESCRIPTION: The state code for the beneficiary. 
LONG NAME: BENE_STATE_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
AHC data system 
VALUES: 
Two-character postal state code 
AE = US Armed Forces in Europe, the 
Middle East, Africa and Canada 
AK = Alaska 
AL = Alabama 
AR = Arkansas 
AS = American Samoa 
AZ = Arizona 
CA = California
